scores.correctness_notes: Covers all core facts: persistence, (user-id, type, key) deduplication, all three notice types (custom, change-update, warning), pebble_custom_notice event, and direct container query methods. Adds valid extra content (check events, testing harness) beyond the gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: The code example uses `event.notice.key` and `event.notice.last_data`, implying a `.notice` attribute returning a Notice object on PebbleCustomNoticeEvent. The actual ops API exposes `event.notice_id`, `event.notice_key`, `event.notice_type` directly on the event, not a full Notice object via `event.notice`. Minor but a real inaccuracy. CheckInfo.status attribute is also uncertain.
